title: NYC Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting New York City, with a Z-Score of +4.89. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave has brought extremely high temperatures to the city, resulting in a high cooling degree day (CDD) value of 16.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 44%, and winds are blowing at 14.3 km/h, providing little relief from the heat. 
 The lack of heating degree days (HDD) at 0.0 GG indicates that the heat wave is the dominant weather pattern in the city.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately to protect the public.
